common.navBody: Keep customers, follow-ups, and field activity organized on this device.
common.languageBody: You can switch the interface language from the dashboard whenever you need.

errorScreen.title: Something went wrong
errorScreen.body: The app safely stopped this screen. Try again or return to your main flow.

home.subtitle: Offline-first local field CRM
home.includedHint: Core pieces already set up for the first version.
home.languageTestBody: Select a language to try the interface.
home.projectBody: Saha CRM is being shaped to keep customer history, follow-ups, and field activity organized on the phone.
home.projectNoteBody: The next focus is making customer lists, activity history, and follow-ups faster to use.

about.title: About
about.simpleMessage: Saha CRM is a local mobile CRM for keeping customer history, follow-ups, and sales activities on the device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.simpleMessage: Saha CRM settings, language, and backup preferences will be managed here.

homeDashboard.title: Home
homeDashboard.subtitle: Track customers, terms, and daily activity from one place.
homeDashboard.heroBody: Quick navigation, the selected-day agenda, and upcoming terms are all ready in one flow.
homeDashboard.calendarHint: Days with activity are marked. Tap a day to view the details.
homeDashboard.agendaReadyBody: You can view all activities for that day more comfortably in a modal.
homeDashboard.upcomingTermsBody: The nearest pending terms are listed here.
homeDashboard.emptyAgendaBody: You can pick another day or add a new activity from a customer detail screen.
homeDashboard.emptyTodayTasks: There is no scheduled activity for today.
homeDashboard.emptyTermsBody: Active terms will appear here when they are created.

settingsDashboard.title: Settings
settingsDashboard.subtitle: Manage language and manual backup safely on the device.
settingsDashboard.languageBody: Switch your preference instantly. The interface and navigation update together.
settingsDashboard.themeBody: Switch the app between light and dark mode.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.summaryUnavailable: The notification summary could not be loaded right now.
notifications.testSuccessBody: If the device allows notifications, you should see it immediately.
notifications.syncSuccessBody: Pending term reminders were synced again on this device.
notifications.errorBody: Something went wrong while handling notifications.

messages.testBody: Notifications are working on this device.

settingsDashboard.dataBody: Export backups from your device. A short confirmation is shown before download starts.
settingsDashboard.aboutPrivacyLineOne: Your customer records stay on this device.
settingsDashboard.aboutPrivacyLineTwo: Backups only start when you explicitly download JSON or Excel.
settingsDashboard.aboutPrivacyLineThree: No customer data is sent to a server by this app.
settingsDashboard.securityBody: Your data stays on your device and is never sent to any server.
settingsDashboard.confirmJsonBody: Are you sure you want to download the JSON backup?
settingsDashboard.confirmExcelBody: Are you sure you want to download the Excel file?
settingsDashboard.footerNote: Data stays on-device and exports only begin when you explicitly start them.
settingsDashboard.backupBody: You can export all data or import a backup JSON that you already have.
settingsDashboard.backupSummaryBody: {{customers}} customers, {{terms}} terms, and {{activities}} activities are ready to export. Summary date: {{exportedAt}}.
settingsDashboard.exportHint: This content was also sent to the share sheet. You can review it here as well.
settingsDashboard.exportErrorBody: Something went wrong while creating the backup.
settingsDashboard.exportExcelErrorBody: Something went wrong while creating the Excel file.
settingsDashboard.importHint: Paste the JSON content that you previously exported.
settingsDashboard.importEmptyBody: Paste a backup JSON before importing.
settingsDashboard.importSuccessBody: Your data has been restored successfully.
settingsDashboard.importErrorBody: The backup could not be read. Check the JSON content.
settingsDashboard.dataPromiseBody: This app does not use cloud sync. The backup flow is fully manual and offline-first.

customersScreen.subtitle: Customer records will be listed here. The card view will be enriched in the next step.
customersScreen.emptyBody: The first customer you add will appear here.
customersScreen.searchEmptyBody: Try changing the search text and search again.

customerDetail.emptyActivitiesBody: When you add the first activity for this customer, it will appear here.
customerDetail.notFoundBody: This record may no longer exist.

newTerm.title: New Term
newTerm.submitError: The term record could not be created.

validation.orderDate: Order date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.expectedDate: Expected date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.expectedDateAfterOrder: Expected date cannot be earlier than the order date.

termsScreen.title: Terms
termsScreen.subtitle: Terms created for all customers are listed here.

customerEdit.title: Edit Customer
customerEdit.subtitle: Update the customer record for {{customerName}}.
customerEdit.submitError: The customer record could not be updated.
customerEdit.notFoundBody: This record may no longer exist.

newCustomer.title: New Customer
newCustomer.subtitle: Fill in the details to create a new customer record.
newCustomer.submitError: The customer record could not be created.

newActivity.title: New Activity
newActivity.subtitle: Create a new activity record for {{customerName}}.
newActivity.submitError: The activity record could not be created.

validation.date: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.simpleMessage: Saha CRM keeps data on the device; export and import actions only start when the user chooses them.

phaseZero.projectBody: The app brings customer, activity, term, and backup flows into a simple field CRM structure that works without internet access.
phaseZero.languageBody: i18n stays in place. Language support remains available here while the main workflow is being built, and the preference continues to be stored on device.
phaseZero.homeCardBody: Summary cards, the monthly calendar, and selected-day activities will live on this screen.
phaseZero.customersCardBody: Search, list, new customer modal, and the customer detail flow will be built in this module.
phaseZero.termsCardBody: Pending terms, arrival status, and the automatic activity flow will be managed in this module.
phaseZero.customersScreenBody: This screen is a Phase 0 placeholder. The search field, FlatList customer list, and new customer modal will be added in later phases.
phaseZero.customersScreenHint: Last-action details will also be derived from the latest activity here.
phaseZero.termsScreenBody: This screen is a Phase 0 placeholder. Term cards, the new term modal, and the "Mark as arrived" action will be added in later phases.
phaseZero.termsScreenHint: When a term is marked as arrived, arrivedAt and the automatic activity flow will run in this module.
phaseZero.settingsScreenBody: This screen is now part of the main tab flow. Backup and app-level preferences will be managed from here.
phaseZero.settingsScreenHint: JSON export, JSON import, confirmation dialogs, and version details will be added to this screen in later phases.
phaseZero.settingsBackupBody: This is where on-device data export and import will live. The goal is manual backup without cloud sync or a backend.
